name: New York Style Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the clams well.
2. Place the clams in a kettle with boiling water, cover tightly, and steam quickly until the shells open. Remove the clams from their shells and chop them finely (chopping the hard part and leaving the soft part large). Set aside the clam liquor separately.
3. In a separate kettle, add potatoes, carrots, and celery to cold water and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add the onion and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. When the vegetables have cooked for 15 minutes, add the clams, clam liquor, tomatoes, and thyme. Cook for 1 hour.
6. Add the salt pork and onion, and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
7. Season with pepper and more salt if necessary.
8. Serve with pilot crackers. (Note: Any desired vegetable or herb may be added.)
